_meta.resume_note: The official 2025-2026 catalog's complete Certificates and Degrees A-Z inventory contains no general Biology/Biological Sciences AS-T, AS, or AA.

none_found_sources.locator: 2025-2026 San Joaquin Delta College Catalog, Certificates and Degrees (A-Z); no Biology or Biological Sciences award entry

notes: Delta publishes Biology coursework and transfer preparation, but no in-scope Biology award in the official 2025-2026 degree inventory. Its broad Interdisciplinary Studies: Mathematics and Science AS is outside this pass.
